context_for_next_testing_agent: All 11 requested changes verified working correctly. Business flow: signup as Business to test items 1-7,10. Influencer flow: set localStorage userRole='influencer' and fruitee_influencer_progress={profile:true,preferences:true} to access payment page. All data is mocked via localStorage.
mocked_api_note: ALL DATA IS MOCKED - No backend integration. Form data stored in localStorage only.
